THE COURT INSTRUCTS PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AND THEN, BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 7/23/21, EMAIL THE COURT AT CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG IF THE PARTIES WISH THE COURT TO DEFER ITS RULING FOR A PERIOD OF TIME NOT TO EXCEED 30 DAYS.
